human_actions_pending.action: Need desktop room with 3 peers to test test 4 (WebRTC data channels)
human_actions_pending.context: Test 4 requires phone connected to 3 desktops simultaneously

decisions.decision: requestWakeLock() moved to DeviceMotionEvent gesture callback
decisions.rationale: iOS silently rejects wake lock requests outside user gesture context
Prevents phone-state stream racing register stream as first WT message — server rejects non-register first message
Default tracing_subscriber shows ERROR only; INFO needed to diagnose WT connection issues

decisions.decision: Updated Makefile dev-certs to auto-detect LAN IP
decisions.rationale: mkcert cert must cover LAN IP for WebTransport TLS to work on real phone devices

next_action: Continue UAT from test 4: WebRTC data channels (3-desktop room). Then test 5: heartbeat/disconnect. Then commit all fixes and complete UAT.
context_notes: Several bugs found and fixed during UAT. All fixes are in phone.js and Makefile/docker-compose. No server code changed. Phone must hard-refresh Safari to load latest phone.js (304 cache issue — user may need to clear site data).
